startup.mode_exact: 🎯 --exact mode enabled: installing exact versions without ^
startup.mode_trivy: 🔍 --trivy mode enabled: only analyzing and fixing CVEs with Trivy

audit.title: 🔍 --audit mode: Vulnerability analysis (read-only)

overrides.apply_question: Do you want to apply these overrides? (Y/n):

overrides.apply_manually: You can apply them manually in package.json when ready.

packages.orphan: ⚠️  {{pkg}} detected as direct but not in package.json (will be treated as transitive)

families.important_detected: ⚠️  IMPORTANT: Vulnerable packages belonging to families detected:

families.all_subdeps: → All vulnerabilities are in subdependencies (overrides will be used)

version.check_changelog: Run your tests and check the CHANGELOG of updated packages.
